name: resend-cli
description: > Operate the Resend platform from the terminal — send emails (including React Email .tsx templates via --react-email), manage domains, contacts, broadcasts, templates, webhooks, API keys, logs, automations, and events via the `resend` CLI. Use when the user wants to run Resend commands in the shell, scripts, or CI/CD pipelines, or send/preview React Email templates. Always load this skill before running `resend` commands — it contains the non-interactive flag contract and gotchas that prevent s
author: resend
summary_zh: 这是Resend的命令行工具，能让你在终端、脚本或CI/CD流水线中发邮件（支持React模板）并管理各项配置，轻松实现邮件服务的自动化与集成。
